halls.Hall A: Main entrance, ground floor. Hosts keynote sessions.
halls.Hall B: First floor, east wing. Hosts AI and Tech sessions.
halls.Hall C: First floor, west wing. Hosts Design sessions.
halls.Hall D: Second floor. Hosts Startup and Business sessions.

facilities.food: Food Court 1 (Ground floor, north wing) and Food Court 2 (Second floor balcony).
facilities.washrooms: Near every hall exit and next to the food courts.
